name: yassin-pfe-empirical
description: ESSS PFE research pipelines by Dr Khaled Yassin. Guided, Cowork-only skills that take a student from a locked literature review and note de cadrage to a peer-review-ready, submission-ready empirical manuscript.

plugins.name: yassin-pfe-empirical-research
plugins.description: Thirteen-step ESSS PFE empirical-research track (Component 2): protocol, data and analysis, and manuscript, with two hard locks, an enforced Consensus deep-research backbone, and a simulated peer review.
